# Logfire signature suppression list (my "Ignored" state).
#
# The GHA read token cannot reach Logfire's issue-state API, so this file is the
# git-tracked stand-in for marking a signature "Ignored". One substring per line.
# Matched case-insensitively as a plain substring (NO regex) against a haystack
# of: exception_type | service_name | label | fingerprint.
#
# Lines starting with # and blank/whitespace-only lines are ignored.
# Examples:
#   httpx.ReadTimeout
#   anyio.ClosedResourceError
#   fastmcp.exceptions.ToolError
#   204b29bd3c59243560a453f9fb2d5abf8a1293f94a18839d6bc0ab43702d213e
